arts.sum: Reims come into Saturday's welcome of Nice on a run of one win in their last six, and that came in the Coupe de France. They have failed to win their last four at home. Nice did well to claim a 3-2 h...

arts.ttl: Wolves sign Reims defender Agbadou for £16.6m
arts.sum: Wolves complete the £16.6m signing of defender Emmanuel Agbadou from Reims on a four-and-a-half year deal.
